## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Imubit's sales strategy and potential growth opportunities with GrowthX's support](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Imubit is expanding into new verticals: chemicals, upstream, LNG, and mining](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Current sales cycle is 12-18 months; organic growth strategy recommended](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Key focus areas: solving slugging in offshore oil & gas, expanding across customer fleets](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Need for multi-threading approach with major accounts like ExxonMobil](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1385.0)

## Topics

### Imubit's Current Market Position

  - [Working primarily in refining, now targeting chemicals, upstream, LNG, and mining](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Key accounts: Hoke, FHR, Invista, HF Sinclair, Citgo, Marathon, ExxonMobil, Chevron, Shell](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1527.0)
  - [Disqualified accounts: Valero, Phillips 66](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Current organic authority score: 22 (potential for improvement)](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

### Sales Strategy Challenges

  - [Long sales cycles (12-18 months) require strategic approach](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Need for technical expertise in sales team, but not scalable](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Challenge in stirring up inbound interest and getting eyeballs on Imubit's solutions](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Importance of addressing business problems, not just technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=979.0)

### Potential Growth Opportunities

  - [Focus on solving slugging for offshore oil & gas production](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)
  - [Expand relationships with existing customers across their fleets](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [Target director-level contacts and digital transformation leaders](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Explore multi-threading approach with major accounts like ExxonMobil](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)

### Marketing and Outreach Tactics

  - [Leverage organic growth strategy to improve authority score and drive traffic](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Consider strategic events at conferences (e.g., sponsored breakfasts)](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Importance of building relationships at industry events](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Potential for targeted outreach to key decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

### Staffing and Resource Allocation

  - [Current need to hire additional team members (3 positions mentioned)](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [Glenda managing Exxon account personally due to resource constraints](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1902.0)
  - [Potential to explore hiring experienced sales professionals from industry](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1934.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Bruno to scrub contact list and share relevant director-level contacts](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
  - [Consider strategies for multi-threading approach with major accounts](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1856.0)
  - [Explore potential for strategic events or targeted outreach at conferences](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Evaluate staffing needs and potential candidates for sales team expansion](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1914.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue supporting organic growth strategy to improve Imubit's online presence](https://fathom.video/share/nniLkXGnAP2PUqbLkADk3spsUbZsbwzb?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
